title: Notify Board Owners
excerpt: When building automations that send notifications, there is an ability to have the notification go to board subscribers, but not the option for Board Owners. It would be great to add this as an additional option.

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: When building automations that send notifications, there is an ability to have the notification go to board subscribers, but not the option for Board Owners. It would be great to add this as an additional option.
